title: The Balance Experiment — Journal Recap
body: Long-form recap covering Days 33 through 75 of the Balance Experiment, including air-cycle testing, summer heat observations, nitrate trends, refugium maturity, and ongoing BBA management.
quick_facts: Balance Experiment recap; May 14–June 25, 2026; Day 33–Day 75; Phase 3 air-cycle operation; summer heat observations; nitrate trend tracking; refugium maturity; BBA management
nitrate_ppm: ~5 ppm post-reset to ~40–80 ppm before maintenance; current ~10–20 ppm
